title: Rebirth of the World
summary: The rebuilding of the world took over 2000 years. The city of Dust was re-founded during this era.
details: The rebuilding of the world took over 2000 years. The city of Dust was re-founded during this era.

title: The Great Elven-Dwarven War
summary: A great war between the Dwarfs and Elves ravaged the world for 200 years before heroes wielding weapons of Ur ended the conflict and brought peace to the realms. This was the first major conflict like this to begin and end without God's influence.
details: A great war between the Dwarfs and Elves ravaged the world for 200 years before heroes wielding weapons of Ur ended the conflict and brought peace to the realms. This was the first major conflict like this to begin and end without God's influence.

title: The New World
summary: Civilization took thousands of years to recover from Jorumudire and eventually reached greater heights than ever in the time of high magic.
details: Civilization took thousands of years to recover from Jorumudire and eventually reached greater heights than ever in the time of high magic.

title: Ascension of the Raven Queen
summary: An elven woman created a ritual to undo death. Wijos came for her and dragged her to the Shadowfell. Instead of destroying her, Wijos was aghast as the woman began to siphon power from the plane. The Raven Queen stole power from Wijos, claimed new divinity, and trapped her in the deepest parts of the Shadowfell.
details: An elven woman created a ritual to undo death. Wijos came for her and dragged her to the Shadowfell. Instead of destroying her, Wijos was aghast as the woman began to siphon power from the plane. The Raven Queen stole power from Wijos, claimed new divinity, and trapped her in the deepest parts of the Shadowfell.

title: The Spellplague
summary: Hearing of the Raven Queen’s success, many wizards attempted to obtain godhood. Kartus, a mage from Benthill, succeeded by channeling magic through the aether of four cities and casting the first and last 12th-level spell. For six seconds, he swapped bodies with Mystryl, god of magic. Cyric manipulated the event and stabbed the new god with Gram, killing Kartus and leaving Mystryl in a mortal body. This caused the Spellplague. Magic became wild and unreliable, spell storms crossed the world, aberrant creatures stalked the land, and much of the great flying arcane world crumbled. It took Mystryl 20 years to return to divinity as Mystra and create a new rule: spells cannot be higher than 9th level.
details: Hearing of the Raven Queen’s success, many wizards attempted to obtain godhood. Kartus, a mage from Benthill, succeeded by channeling magic through the aether of four cities and casting the first and last 12th-level spell. For six seconds, he swapped bodies with Mystryl, god of magic. Cyric manipulated the event and stabbed the new god with Gram, killing Kartus and leaving Mystryl in a mortal body. This caused the Spellplague. Magic became wild and unreliable, spell storms crossed the world, aberrant creatures stalked the land, and much of the great flying arcane world crumbled. It took Mystryl 20 years to return to divinity as Mystra and create a new rule: spells cannot be higher than 9th level.

title: Vecna
summary: After the Spellplague, the world was left in ruin. The Magerium collapsed into the Arcane Alliance. Mages experimented with necromancy and blood magic, and non-mages were treated like chattel. Vecna was born to a hedge witch cast from Dracith. He became a squire to an archmage, heard whispers of darkness, discovered the Book of Darkness, created an undead army, was betrayed by Kas, fell into the Abyss, returned as an arch-lich, took over Sigil, unlocked the secrets of godhood, and became the God of Undeath.
details: After the Spellplague, the world was left in ruin. The Magerium collapsed into the Arcane Alliance. Mages experimented with necromancy and blood magic, and non-mages were treated like chattel. Vecna was born to a hedge witch cast from Dracith. He became a squire to an archmage, heard whispers of darkness, discovered the Book of Darkness, created an undead army, was betrayed by Kas, fell into the Abyss, returned as an arch-lich, took over Sigil, unlocked the secrets of godhood, and became the God of Undeath.

title: The Shattering
summary: Major transition point in world history.
details: Major transition point in world history.

title: Founding of New Hisaltica and Pretoria
summary: After a succession crisis and brief civil war, Hisaltica was refounded in Melora’la and the nation of Pretoria was founded. Much of this was accomplished by the legendary heroes known as the Four Dragons: Victoria the Snaping Dragon, Vivian the Quite Dragon, Cid the Flying Dragon, and Su Shi the Singing Dragon.
details: After a succession crisis and brief civil war, Hisaltica was refounded in Melora’la and the nation of Pretoria was founded. Much of this was accomplished by the legendary heroes known as the Four Dragons: Victoria the Snaping Dragon, Vivian the Quite Dragon, Cid the Flying Dragon, and Su Shi the Singing Dragon.

title: Founding of the Republic of Velesco
summary: The Republic of Velesco was founded and began to wage war against the Empire. They were divinely blessed by Avandra.
details: The Republic of Velesco was founded and began to wage war against the Empire. They were divinely blessed by Avandra.

title: Birth of Melif
summary: Melif, future archmage, is born in Velesco in the city of Coisail.
details: Melif, future archmage, is born in Velesco in the city of Coisail.

title: Satchel is Created
summary: Satchel is created.
details: Satchel is created.

title: Binding of the Dontoc
summary: Archmage Melif binds the new Dontoc Tewntyou to his service and his blood. She would serve his heirs for the next 750 years.
details: Archmage Melif binds the new Dontoc Tewntyou to his service and his blood. She would serve his heirs for the next 750 years.

title: The End of the Order
summary: After years without the birth of a new Knight, the servants of Endemyon are wiped from existence when Archmage Melif traps the last Knight, Parthunax, in his pocket dimension.
details: After years without the birth of a new Knight, the servants of Endemyon are wiped from existence when Archmage Melif traps the last Knight, Parthunax, in his pocket dimension.

title: Creation of Brathdar
summary: Helmed by Archmage Melif and a number of Veil-drawn artificers, the isolated country of Brathdar is conquered in a night and then hermitized. Artifice would drive the nation to an extreme level of technological advancement.
details: Helmed by Archmage Melif and a number of Veil-drawn artificers, the isolated country of Brathdar is conquered in a night and then hermitized. Artifice would drive the nation to an extreme level of technological advancement.

title: Rise of the God-King
summary: After much of the north felt the sting of Vecna and lived in torment from the Arcanists, the God-King rose up, uniting the Vanderlands and forging a pact with the gods for his own divine power.
details: After much of the north felt the sting of Vecna and lived in torment from the Arcanists, the God-King rose up, uniting the Vanderlands and forging a pact with the gods for his own divine power.

title: Benthill Independence
summary: Deleran Dragoth uses ancient precedent to separate Benthill from the Empire Arcane. The Empire lacks the resources to stop this, but scars the land of Benthill so that magic in the region becomes very rare.
details: Deleran Dragoth uses ancient precedent to separate Benthill from the Empire Arcane. The Empire lacks the resources to stop this, but scars the land of Benthill so that magic in the region becomes very rare.

title: First Benthill-Pretoria War
summary: Benthill declares a holy war against Pretoria. The war is mostly fought in the moors of Benthill as the Pretorian counterattack is wildly successful.
details: Benthill declares a holy war against Pretoria. The war is mostly fought in the moors of Benthill as the Pretorian counterattack is wildly successful.

title: Dissolution of the Empire
summary: The Red Grove declares war on Kokonoko, beginning the spiral of civil conflicts that would dissolve the Empire over the next 200 years.
details: The Red Grove declares war on Kokonoko, beginning the spiral of civil conflicts that would dissolve the Empire over the next 200 years.

title: War of the River
summary: Benthill declares war against Hisaltica, and later Pretoria, in a second holy crusade. The war is mostly fought in naval conflicts in Melora’la.
details: Benthill declares war against Hisaltica, and later Pretoria, in a second holy crusade. The war is mostly fought in naval conflicts in Melora’la.

title: Armistice of Kokonoko
summary: The senate of Kokonoko agrees to do no harm to the HRA and ends the organized conflicts.
details: The senate of Kokonoko agrees to do no harm to the HRA and ends the organized conflicts.

title: The Wild War
summary: Blackhorn, Red Grove, and the Republic of Velesco are involved in a three-way conflict over the city of Chaususte. The war is resolved diplomatically after severe losses on all sides due to the nature of Velesco.
details: Blackhorn, Red Grove, and the Republic of Velesco are involved in a three-way conflict over the city of Chaususte. The war is resolved diplomatically after severe losses on all sides due to the nature of Velesco.

title: Third Pretoria-Benthill War
summary: King Samson Dragoth V declares war on Pretoria after a political incident in neighboring Velesco.
details: King Samson Dragoth V declares war on Pretoria after a political incident in neighboring Velesco.

title: Dune’s Pit Discovered
summary: The dungeon of Dune’s Pit is discovered.
details: The dungeon of Dune’s Pit is discovered.

title: Founding of the Wirhorn Adventuring Guild
summary: Representatives from all over Wirhorn unite in Mantown to found the Wirhorn Adventuring Guild with the aim to aid and assist in mutual profit.
details: Representatives from all over Wirhorn unite in Mantown to found the Wirhorn Adventuring Guild with the aim to aid and assist in mutual profit.

title: Second Hisaltic Civil War
summary: The southern cities rebel and a long and bloody civil war is fought over the cities. Eventually, the Empire is able to retain control.
details: The southern cities rebel and a long and bloody civil war is fought over the cities. Eventually, the Empire is able to retain control.

summary: Albert Jimbledorf is born.
details: Albert Jimbledorf is born.

details: Dol Dorn dies, taking with him the Hand of Tyr.

title: The Unveiling
summary: A devil incursion into Alnera and a massive tsunami lead to the end of the second campaign and the destruction of the moon Na’tin. The Grand Enchantment is broken, allowing people to see and travel to the hidden world.
details: A devil incursion into Alnera and a massive tsunami lead to the end of the second campaign and the destruction of the moon Na’tin. The Grand Enchantment is broken, allowing people to see and travel to the hidden world.
